query:
INSERT INTO core.events (
            id,
            source,
            event_type,
            host,
            payload,
            ts_orig,
            source_material_id,
            anchor_byte
        ) VALUES (
            $1::uuid,
            $2,
            $3,
            $4,
            $5,
            $6,
            $7::uuid,
            $8
        )
